description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On December 10, 2025 at 12:21 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle ("Waymo AV") operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving an SUV on 18th Street at Capp Street.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling eastbound on 18th Street when it slowed to a stop for a flashing red light at the intersection with Capp Street. 
While the Waymo AV was stopped, an SUV traveling in the same lane approached the Waymo AV from behind, and the front of the SUV 
made contact with the rear of the stationary Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV's Level 4 ADS was engaged in 
autonomous mode. Both vehicles sustained damage.
Print
Clear Form
